family_rationale: This is the next unprocessed non-sims constraint-ladder document in folder order after OBSTRUCTION_ADMISSIBILITY_v1.md.
The document is a compact formal admissibility micro-spec for orthogonality-like structure rather than a stitched orthogonality narrative surface.

Its dominant value is the fail-closed boundary that narrows orthogonality language to partial relation structure over admitted axis-like function symbols while blocking metric, basis, rank, completeness, dimensionality, and global orthogonalization inflation.
No active A2 surfaces were mutated.
possible_downstream_consequence_policy: possible downstream consequence only; preserve this as the orthogonality-language boundary in which Orth remains partial, nonmetric, non-basis-forming, non-authoritative for identity, and non-flattening of transport or obstruction witnesses
notes: The dominant reuse value is the explicit reduction of orthogonality language to partial relation structure over admitted axis-like function symbols.
The dominant risk is lexical overread from orthogonality vocabulary into metric, basis, completeness, or Hilbert-space doctrine.
The next bounded step continues folder order at Path contract v1.md.
